problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
